creator: kpect@protonmail.com
text:
Hello.
I'm unable to build www/firefox because of problem with lang/rust. I get following error:

$ uname -a
FreeBSD KPECT 12.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE KPECT  amd64

# cd /usr/ports/lang/rust && make
===>   rust-1.31.1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by rust-1.31.1 for building
===>  Extracting for rust-1.31.1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for rust/rustc-1.31.1-src.tar.xz.
...
  extracting cargo-0.31.0-x86_64-unknown-freebsd/cargo/bin/cargo
  extracting cargo-0.31.0-x86_64-unknown-freebsd/cargo/share/zsh/site-functions/_cargo
running: /usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage0/bin/cargo build --manifest-path /usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/src/bootstrap/Cargo.toml --frozen
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/x.py", line 20, in <module>
    bootstrap.main()
  File "/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 858, in main
    bootstrap(help_triggered)
  File "/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 829, in bootstrap
    build.build_bootstrap()
  File "/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 652, in build_bootstrap
    run(args, env=env, verbose=self.verbose)
  File "/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 151, in run
    raise RuntimeError(err)
RuntimeError: failed to run: /usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage0/bin/cargo build --manifest-path /usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.31.1-src/src/bootstrap/Cargo.toml --frozen
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/rust
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/rust
#
